title: Cuneiform Tablet #0078: Old Akkadian Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
